overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a cowboy hat exploring the dimly lit interior of a rustic wooden cabin, moving through the living room, hallway, and dining area.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cabin living room with stone fireplace and red sofa

agents.ego_description: walking around the living room examining the sofa and fireplace area

entered.detail: large sofa with red floral upholstery positioned against the left wall
stone fireplace with wooden mantel at the far end of the room
tall wooden bookcase with multiple shelves
window with cream-colored curtains on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character explores the main living room of a rustic wooden cabin, featuring a red floral sofa, stone fireplace, and wooden bookcase in dim interior lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wooden hallway with multiple doors

events.description: character enters narrow hallway from living room

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow hallway past several closed wooden doors

entered.detail: several closed wooden doors lining both sides of the hallway
framed picture hanging on the right wall of the hallway

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open living room into a narrow enclosed hallway lined with wooden doors and a framed picture on the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin dining room with wooden table and chairs

events.description: character enters dining room through doorway at end of hallway

agents.ego_description: entering the dining room and walking around the wooden table before turning back

entered.detail: rectangular wooden dining table in the center of the room
wooden chairs positioned around the dining table
window with beige curtains on the left wall of the dining room
wooden shelf mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dining room containing a wooden table and chairs, walks around the space near a window with beige curtains, then turns to exit back toward the hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: living room area with wooden dresser and red curtains

events.description: character returns to living room area and approaches wooden dresser
character stops at dresser and looks toward the window

agents.ego_description: returning to the living room and approaching a wooden dresser beneath a window with red curtains

entered.detail: dark wooden dresser with drawers positioned against the wall
window with red patterned curtains above the dresser
metal water pitcher sitting on top of the dresser

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the main living area and approaches a wooden dresser positioned beneath a window with red patterned curtains, where a metal pitcher sits on top.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the dim interior of a rustic wooden cabin, transitioning from an open living area through a narrow corridor and into a dining space. It begins in the main living room, passing a red floral sofa, a stone fireplace, and a wooden bookcase. As the character moves forward, the open space tightens into a narrow enclosed hallway lined with wooden doors and a framed picture. The scene then expands into a dining room featuring a wooden table and chairs near a window with beige curtains, before the camera turns back toward the hallway. Finally, the movement returns to the main living area, approaching a wooden dresser topped with a metal pitcher beneath a window with red patterned curtains.
